title: How to Customize Quiz Results in GoHighLevel — Score Tiers
description: Learn score tiers in GoHighLevel's quiz builder for Indian agencies. Customize results, segment leads, and drive WhatsApp conversions. Free 30-day trial inside.
html_content:
🚀 Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — No credit card required. Start your free trial here →

Quiz Results That Actually Convert: Score Tiers in GoHighLevel for Indian Agencies

You've spent weeks building a lead magnet quiz. Your Bangalore-based digital agency runs it across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. Hundreds of leads flood in—excited, engaged, waiting for their personalized results.

Then what happens?

Most of them see a generic result page. Same message for everyone. No personalization. No next step. They drift to your competitor using Zoho CRM's basic quiz feature, and you've lost the conversion moment that matters.

The Indian Agency Problem: Quiz Results That Don't Match Your Sales Funnel

Here's what we're hearing from agencies across Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Pune: Quiz tools don't adapt to the way Indian businesses actually sell.

You need to:

  • Segment leads instantly based on their answers (high-intent vs. curious)
  • Show different offers in different score ranges
  • Follow up on WhatsApp (not SMS—that's a Western habit)
  • Tie quiz results to your sales workflow without manual intervention
  • Calculate ROI on your quiz funnel in real time

But most quiz builders? They trap you in rigid templates. No conditional logic. No score tiers. No way to show the right message to the right lead at the right time.

GoHighLevel's Quiz Builder solves this. With global score tier management and drag-and-drop result customization, you can build result pages that feel handcrafted for each lead—automatically.

Real Use Case: An E-Learning Agency in Bangalore

Imagine you're running an online education agency in Bangalore, selling coding bootcamps. Your quiz qualifies leads by skill level:

  • Score 0–33: "Beginner" → Show your foundational course (₹15,000)
  • Score 34–66: "Intermediate" → Show your advanced bootcamp (₹45,000)
  • Score 67–100: "Advanced" → Show your enterprise training (custom pricing)

Each tier triggers a different WhatsApp message, a different landing page, and a different sales workflow. No manual work. No confusion. Every lead gets the right offer.

That's what score tiers do.

How to Set Up Score Tiers in GoHighLevel (Step by Step)

Step 1: Create Your Quiz & Define Question Scoring

In GoHighLevel, every quiz question assigns points on a unified 0–100 scale. You control how many points each answer gives. This is cleaner than competitor tools like Zoho CRM, which force category-based scoring.

Example: "What's your budget?"

  • Under ₹5,000 = 10 points
  • ₹5,000–₹25,000 = 50 points
  • ₹25,000+ = 100 points

Step 2: Build Your Score Tiers

Go to your quiz settings and create global score tiers. Here's a framework that works for most Indian B2B agencies:

  • Cold Lead (0–25): Show educational content. No hard sell yet.
  • Warm Lead (26–60): Show case studies & testimonials. Plant the seed.
  • Hot Lead (61–100): Show demo + pricing. Push for a consultation call.

Step 3: Customize Result Pages with Drag-and-Drop Sections

This is where GoHighLevel wins. You don't need a developer. Drag sections into each result page:

  • Hero image & headline
  • Score display (visual progress bar)
  • Personalized text based on tier
  • Next-step CTA (WhatsApp button, Calendly link, etc.)
  • Social proof (testimonials from similar leads)
  • Upsell offer (tied to their score tier)

Each section has visibility rules. So if a lead scores 75, they only see sections marked "61–100."

Step 4: Connect to WhatsApp Automation

This is the Indian secret sauce. When a lead finishes the quiz, GoHighLevel auto-triggers a WhatsApp message—not SMS, not email—WhatsApp.

Integrate WhatsApp Business API through official Meta partners (like Twilio or MessageBird) with GoHighLevel to ensure compliance and reliability:

  • Cold Lead gets: "Thanks for taking our quiz! Here's a free e-book on [topic]. Questions? Reply here."
  • Warm Lead gets: "Your results show you're ready for our mid-tier plan. Let's chat about a custom solution."
  • Hot Lead gets: "Book a free demo with our team: [Calendly link]"

No manual follow-up. No lost leads. Just instant, personalized, WhatsApp-native engagement that respects the DPDP Act and customer data privacy standards.

Why This Matters for Your Bottom Line

Let's talk numbers. You're an agency owner in Delhi or Hyderabad. You're already paying for:

  • Zoho CRM (mid-tier): ₹5,000–₹15,000/month
  • Email tool: ₹2,000–₹5,000/month
  • WhatsApp automation: ₹3,000–₹8,000/month
  • Landing page builder: ₹2,000–₹4,000/month
  • GST on all of this: ~18%

Total: ₹15,000–₹40,000/month across 4 tools.

GoHighLevel Starter Plan: $97/month (~₹8,050/month) includes CRM, email, landing pages, WhatsApp automation, and quizzes. All-in-one. One GST invoice. One dashboard. (GST will be applied to your monthly invoice as per Indian SaaS tax regulations.)

GoHighLevel Agency Plan: $297/month (~₹24,650/month) adds white-label capabilities, so you can resell GoHighLevel to your own clients and charge ₹15,000–₹30,000 per month per client.

Even at the Agency Plan, you're consolidating your tool stack and improving margins. And if you have 3–5 clients on white-label? Your unit economics become significantly stronger.

Common Questions from Indian Agencies

Q: Will score tiers work for B2C businesses (e-commerce, coaching)?

Yes. Use tiers to recommend products based on preferences, or segment your email list for different email sequences. A yoga app could use tiers: Beginner (Level 1 classes), Intermediate (vinyasa flow), Advanced (power yoga + pranayama).

Q: Can I change score tiers after launching the quiz?

Absolutely. You can edit tiers anytime. Previous responses won't be affected, but new leads will see updated results. Smart for A/B testing your messaging.

Q: Does GoHighLevel handle GST compliance for Indian invoices?

GoHighLevel's platform pricing is in USD. When you activate a paid plan, GST (18% on SaaS) will apply to your invoice in compliance with Indian tax law. The platform integrates with Indian payment gateways like Razorpay, PayU, and direct UPI payments so you can collect payments from your clients seamlessly.

Q: What if I'm already using Zoho CRM? Can I switch?

Yes. GoHighLevel has built-in Zoho integration for lead syncing. You can run both for a month to migrate data, then switch cleanly. No lost leads. Your team will appreciate the unified dashboard.

Your Next Step: Try It Free for 30 Days

The best way to understand score tiers is to build a quiz yourself. Grab your free 30-day trial of GoHighLevel (no credit card required).

Build a simple lead qualification quiz for your niche. Create 3 score tiers. Drag-and-drop your result sections. Connect WhatsApp automation. Watch leads pour in with instant, personalized follow-up.

The quiz result page isn't a nice-to-have. It's your conversion engine. Make it count.
